productDisplayName: Classic Polo Men Stripes Maroon Polo T-Shirt
description: Composition Maroon and grey striped polo neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, buttoned chest placket, patch pocket on the left chest with embroidered brand logo, and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash with similar colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Sophistication at it's best, this T-shirt from classic polo guarantees effortless style whatever the occasion, while the cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with jeans or chinos and sneakers. Model Statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
